reviews.review_description:
I'm pretty much the exact target audience for SolarBlack.  My favourite games/apps are boxing, sword-fighting, and meditation (mostly for the chill environments more than the actual meditation, though I'm happy to partake from time-to time).  So, SolarBlack pretty much covers me on all fronts.  All packaged into one.  There aren't actually guided meditations, but it does have the nature-type environments - which I find preferable to the glowing/pumping neon hellscapes, some others have.  I would say it's good value for money too, being as you get both the boxing and the sword game packaged together.  I'm not personally interested in the shooting aspect, but you can turn that off.  

If I could add one thing it might be a "Relax" button, that hides all of the UI elements (and then brings it back again).  So you could sit and relax in the environments (by the waterfall for example) for a few minutes between rounds.  I often do the same using different apps elsewhere, switching from boxing to meditation and back again.  It would be nice to be able to do this without switching app.  

It's a recommend from me though.  GG.  Thanks, devs.  :)

I have to say, I’m a huge fan of rhythm-based games, and Solar Black has quickly climbed to one of the top 4 of my list! It’s not just a game, it’s a great way to sneak in some exercise while having fun. 
 
If you’ve played Beat Saber, you’ll notice some similarities, but what truly sets Solar Black apart for me is the breathtaking, immersive environments. Seriously, it’s hard not to get lost in those visuals while you’re dancing around!

That being said, I do wish Solar Black had a bigger music selection. Beat Saber definitely has the upper hand in that area, in my opinion. 

I’m really hoping the developers will roll out more tracks soon or even let us upload our own music. It would also be amazing to be able to adjust the music volume, so I can play my own music—it’s a feature many other games offer, and I know it would keep me coming back for more!

I totally agree with other reviewers: the graphics are absolutely stunning and really enhance the overall experience. Plus, the unique shooting aspect? Game-changer! Sometimes, I get so caught up in the fun that I forget I’m even working out.

I do agree with another review that in boxing mode, the targets can be a bit disorienting. Those arrows sometimes make it tricky to see what’s coming at you. And like another user mentioned, improving the flow of objects would help create more natural movements, ensuring we maintain proper form while still getting a solid workout. 

But honestly, I’m just grateful that boxing mode was added in the first place—it’s a wonderful feature that really elevates the game!

Yes, I also agree that it would be awesome to have a playlist option for longer play sessions without interruptions. 

Also, having a wider variety of tracks and genres would really take the experience to the next level. I find myself skipping volume 3 entirely because it's tough to vibe with, and I can only play the same songs from volumes 1 and 2 so many times before I crave some more variety.

All in all, though, I genuinely enjoy Solar Black. The developers have done a fantastic job creating a game that’s both entertaining and offers a great workout. I can’t wait to see how they evolve this game and what new features they’ll introduce. Here’s hoping for more music and some tweaks in the future!

I just bought the app and I’m already really enjoying it — I can tell this is going to be one of my favorites.

My only suggestion for the developers would be to improve the flow of the objects. Right now, they make sharp turns that feel a bit abrupt before I can hit them in Boxing mode. A smoother, more natural motion would make the experience even better.

Also, it would help if the portal were positioned slightly farther back — it feels a bit too close as it is.

Other than that, it’s a fantastic app, and I’m already loving it!

First of all, this game is so polished!  Graphics are incredible.

I bought it primarily for the boxing and really enjoy it!  But.......I'm only playing one song at a time and by the time my heart rate climbs, the song is over and I have to find another song to play which brings my heart rate back down. It happens each time a song ends.

Is there a way to have playlists of numerous songs back to back to get a longer continuous workout?  If not, could this be added in a future update?
Thanks,

developer_response.body:
Hello Jake! Thank you so much for your kind words! I'm thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game and appreciate the graphics.

I completely understand your point about keeping the workout intensity up. Currently, the game is designed for individual song-based sessions, but the idea of a playlist mode for continuous workouts is definitely interesting. I'll look into this, and if more players share the same interest, we'll consider it for a future update. For now I would recommend using long songs - there is even one with 8 minutes.

If others would like to see this feature as well, please mark this feedback as helpful—it helps me prioritize new features!

Thanks again for your support, and happy boxing!

reviews.review_description: Solar Black being the name I wasn’t expecting all the colors. There’s a lot going on but it’s not like I’m going to exhaustion (at least yet), but I am moving about nicely and having fun doing it.   I have not yet cared for boxing mode, the way the targets were coming at me was disorienting.  No problems on other two modes.  I mean it’s on sale thru 2/23/25, give it a whirl. I really like the music and experience so far, but I’m only 30 min in.  Some of you this won’t be your cup of tea so refund it.  I rated this at 4 stars but that’s not a knock on the game.  Ll play more this weekend and modify this accordingly

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving Solar Black a try! We’re glad you’re enjoying the movement and the music. We hear you on the boxing mode—your feedback is super valuable, and we’re always looking at ways to improve the experience. Hope you had fun playing more last weekend, and we'd love to hear any further thoughts you have! Also, great call on grabbing it during the sale. 😉🥊

reviews.review_description: Beautiful, seamless graphics with a really smooth flow and great music. I look forward to my daily session.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! 😊 I'm thrilled to hear you're enjoying the visuals, music, and overall flow. Knowing it's become part of your daily routine is the highest compliment. I'm excited to keep improving and adding more. Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: I wanted to make sure to leave feedback for this game because I want to see it become popular. I consider myself a rhythm game enthusiast and I'm always on the lookout for bold new takes on the genre. This game is new, yet already seems very polished. I would describe it as somewhat of a mix between Beat Saber and Pistol Whip, but it has a personality all its own. I can't wait to see how this game develops over time! I would recommend it to anyone who loves rhythm games and will be recommending it to all of my friends with a VR headset. I only hope that new music continues to be added over time, but the current selection is a great start.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! 😊 Hearing that my game resonates with rhythm enthusiasts like yourself means the world to me. I’m thrilled that you enjoy the mix of gameplay styles and that it’s standing out as its own unique experience. I’ll definitely keep working hard to polish and expand it further—new music is absolutely on my radar! Your support and word-of-mouth recommendations are invaluable, and I truly appreciate you sharing it with your friends. Feel free to reach out anytime with suggestions or ideas! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
The music in this game is great!

A very nice and different rhythm sabre game.. where you can also shoot at incoming enemies.

Dance, chop, dodge and shoot in rhythm to the music.

Decent graphics, but it’s more about getting drawn in to the music and rhythm and getting a workout as you play.

Plenty of various tracks with increasing BPM, to ramp up your movements.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your awesome feedback! I'm thrilled that you're enjoying the music and finding the combination of dancing, chopping, dodging, and shooting to the rhythm fun and engaging. It's great to hear that you're getting a solid workout while being immersed in the music and gameplay! We are always aiming to provide that perfect balance of rhythm and challenge, and I'm glad it's hitting the mark for you. Thanks again for your support, and I hope you continue to enjoy the increasing BPM and variety of tracks!

reviews.review_title: A Great rival to Beat Saber
reviews.review_description:
Only just picked this up, so only a couple of hours into the game, but boy am I having fun, great beat mechanics, with some shooting elements that gives it a little twist.
Definitely a recommendation from me if you like a great soundtrack to keep fit to.
Yes it’s like Beat Saber, but we have tons of FPS.
There is room for this on the meta store.
Fabulous work from the solo dev. Looking forward to going so much deeper into the game.
A brilliant hidden little gem.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your fantastic review! I'm absolutely delighted to hear you're having fun and enjoying the beat mechanics and shooting elements – that little twist is something we’re really proud of. It's awesome to know that you see it as a worthy rival to Beat Saber and that there's room for both experiences! Your recommendation means the world to us, especially coming from someone who appreciates a great soundtrack while staying fit. Huge thanks for your support and kind words! We can’t wait for you to dive even deeper into the game!

reviews.review_description:
Really getting into this game now, some say oh another beat sabre rip off! 

It’s way different and very unique in its style love the fact it incorporates shooting within the game and actual bots to shoot along with gems to re load your ammo. 

Enjoying it well worth the purchase.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your amazing feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you're really getting into the game and appreciating its unique style. It’s awesome to know that the shooting mechanics and the combination of bots and gems to reload your ammo are standing out as enjoyable features for you. We set out to create something different, and hearing that it's well worth the purchase makes all our efforts worthwhile. Thanks again for your support, and we hope you continue to have a blast playing!

reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the music and light sabor style exercise techniques. Very unique title. The hits match well. I appreciate having a game like this that isn't focused on micro transactions or subscriptions. Let's hope the developer's focus is a polished product which seems to be the case.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your thoughtful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the music and the lightsaber-style exercise techniques – we really wanted to create something unique and engaging. It’s fantastic to know that you appreciate the focus on gameplay rather than microtransactions or subscriptions. Our goal is definitely to keep improving and polishing the game, and your support and encouragement mean a lot to us. We’re excited to continue delivering a quality experience! Thanks again for playing and sharing your thoughts!

reviews.review_description:
I've only played this for about ten minutes and I'm knackered 
I love it it's the perfect workout for me as I'm disabled after beating cancer two years ago

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us! It means a lot to hear that you’re enjoying the game and finding it to be a great workout, especially after everything you’ve been through. I'm incredibly inspired by your strength and perseverance, and I'm honored that our game is a part of your fitness journey. Wishing you many more fun, energetic sessions! Thank you again for your support!
